title: AI Developer | Onsite, Noida | Open to India-based candidates only
company_focus: Enterprise learning and AI solutions for business problems
description:
AI Developer | Onsite, Noida | Open to India-based
candidates only

Position type: Full-time employee

Location: Onsite - Noida, India

Why this role exists We are building AI solutions that solve
real business problems, not demos or experiments that live
on a slide. As an AI Developer on our team, you will design,
build, deploy, and continuously improve production-ready AI
and machine learning systems used by real users. This role
is for someone who enjoys hands-on development, cares about
quality and scalability, and wants to see their work move
from idea to impact.

This is a full-time, onsite role based in our Noida office.
You will work closely with engineers, data scientists, and
product partners in a collaborative, fast-moving
environment.

What you will do

Build and deliver AI solutions

- Design, develop, and validate machine learning and deep
  learning models to address domain-specific business
  challenges
- Work across a range of approaches including classical ML,
  NLP, computer vision, reinforcement learning, and
  transformer-based models
- Apply Generative AI techniques, including working with large
  language models and retrieval-based systems, where
  appropriate

Data engineering and preparation

- Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to source,
  clean, and preprocess large datasets
- Perform feature engineering and data selection to improve
  model inputs and outcomes

Production deployment and MLOps

- Deploy models into production environments that support
  real-time or near real-time use cases
- Build and maintain MLOps pipelines for deployment,
  monitoring, versioning, and retraining
- Use Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms
  such as AWS, Azure, or GCP
- Integrate models into applications through APIs or model-
  serving frameworks

Performance, quality, and improvement

- Optimize models for performance, latency, scalability, and
  resource efficiency
- Implement testing strategies including unit testing,
  regression testing, and A/B testing
- Monitor model performance and improve solutions based on
  data, feedback, and usage patterns

Collaboration and communication

- Work closely with cross-functional teams including
  engineering, product, and subject matter experts
- Document model architectures, training processes, and
  experimental results
- Communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and
  non-technical stakeholders

Ethical and responsible AI

- Contribute to ethical AI practices with attention to
  fairness, transparency, and accountability
- Help identify and mitigate risks such as bias,
  hallucinations, or incorrect outputs

What we’re looking for

Required

- Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in AI or machine
  learning development
- Strong proficiency in Python and experience with libraries
  such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, or Scikit-learn
- Solid understanding of ML and DL architectures including
  CNNs, RNNs or LSTMs, and Transformers
- Experience with data manipulation and analysis using Pandas,
  NumPy, and SciPy
- Familiarity with software engineering best practices
  including Git, testing, and code optimization
- Experience deploying models to cloud platforms or on-premise
  environments
- Ability to work full-time from our Noida office

Preferred

- Hands-on experience with large language models such as GPT,
  Claude, Mistral, or LLaMA
- Experience with prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented
  Generation (RAG), or vector-based search
- Familiarity with tools such as LangChain, LlamaIndex,
  Hugging Face, Pinecone, FAISS, or Weaviate
- Experience with MLOps tools like MLflow, Kubeflow, or DVC
- Exposure to applying AI in domains such as healthcare,
  finance, retail, manufacturing, or customer service
- Strong grounding in statistics and optimization

Why join us

- Work on real, production-grade AI systems with measurable
  business impact
- Collaborate with experienced engineers and AI practitioners
  in a supportive, hands-on environment
- Build breadth across models, tools, and deployment
  approaches while deepening your expertise
- Be part of a team that values responsible, ethical AI and
  high-quality engineering

Ready to apply? If you are excited to build AI systems that
move beyond experimentation and into real-world use, we
would love to hear from you. Apply now and tell us about the
AI solutions you have built and want to build next.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and validate ML and DL models for domain-specific business challenges
Apply GenAI techniques including LLMs and retrieval-based systems where appropriate
Collaborate on data engineering tasks including sourcing, cleaning, and preprocessing large datasets
Deploy models into production environments supporting real-time or near real-time use cases
Build and maintain MLOps pipelines for deployment, monitoring, versioning, and retraining
Optimize models for performance, latency, scalability, and resource efficiency
Integrate models into applications through APIs or model-serving frameworks
Contribute to ethical AI practices including fairness, transparency, and bias mitigation

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building, deploying, and
optimizing ML/DL models and GenAI systems (LLMs, RAG,
transformers) for production use. The developer designs and
validates models, builds MLOps pipelines, and integrates
models into applications — all hands-on AI/ML work.
